faqs.q: Are your paints safe for children?
faqs.a: Yes, we use only non-toxic and hypoallergenic face paints.
Absolutely! We specialize in transforming guests into their favorite characters.

faqs.q: Can you travel to events outside the city?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide services for events across various locations with additional travel fees.

faqs.q: How do I book your services?
faqs.a: You can contact us via phone or our website to schedule a booking.
